title: Auto-Farm
description: Fully automated farming script for Blox Fruits. Supports all seas with customizable routes, smart mob targeting, anti-AFK bypass, and auto-equip best weapon. Runs undetected with built-in failsafes.
code:
-- Eclipse Core | Auto-Farm v2.4
-- Blox Fruits Automated Farming

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()

-- Configuration
local Config = {
    FarmRadius = 150,
    AttackDelay = 0.15,
    AntiAFK = true,
    AutoEquip = true,
    TargetPriority = "nearest", -- nearest | highest_level | boss
    Sea = "auto" -- auto | 1 | 2 | 3
}

-- Anti-AFK Module
if Config.AntiAFK then
    local vu = game:GetService("VirtualUser")
    player.Idled:Connect(function()
        vu:CaptureController()
        vu:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
    end)
end

-- Target Finder
local function findNearestMob()
    local nearest, dist = nil, Config.FarmRadius
    for _, mob in workspace.Mobs:GetChildren() do
        if mob:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and mob.Humanoid.Health > 0 then
            local d = (mob.HumanoidRootPart.Position - character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
            if d < dist then
                nearest, dist = mob, d
            end
        end
    end
    return nearest
end

-- Main Loop
RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
    local target = findNearestMob()
    if target then
        character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = target.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 0, 3)
        task.wait(Config.AttackDelay)
        -- Attack logic handled by hub executor
    end
end)

print("[Eclipse] Auto-Farm loaded successfully")

title: Universal ESP
description: Multi-game ESP overlay that renders player boxes, health bars, names, and distance through walls. Fully customizable colors, toggle per element, and performance-optimized rendering.
code:
-- Dark Matter | Universal ESP v3.2
-- Multi-Game Wallhack Overlay

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local Camera = workspace.CurrentCamera

local player = Players.LocalPlayer

-- ESP Settings
local Settings = {
    Enabled = true,
    ShowBoxes = true,
    ShowNames = true,
    ShowHealth = true,
    ShowDistance = true,
    TeamCheck = false,
    MaxDistance = 1000,
    BoxColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255),
    NameColor = Color3.fromRGB(200, 200, 200),
}

local espObjects = {}

local function createESP(target)
    local esp = Drawing.new("Square")
    esp.Visible = false
    esp.Color = Settings.BoxColor
    esp.Thickness = 1
    esp.Filled = false

    local nameTag = Drawing.new("Text")
    nameTag.Visible = false
    nameTag.Color = Settings.NameColor
    nameTag.Size = 14
    nameTag.Center = true
    nameTag.Outline = true

    return { box = esp, name = nameTag, player = target }
end

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    for _, obj in espObjects do
        if obj.player and obj.player.Character then
            local hrp = obj.player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if hrp then
                local pos, onScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(hrp.Position)
                obj.box.Visible = onScreen and Settings.ShowBoxes
                obj.name.Visible = onScreen and Settings.ShowNames
                if onScreen then
                    obj.box.Position = Vector2.new(pos.X - 20, pos.Y - 25)
                    obj.box.Size = Vector2.new(40, 50)
                    obj.name.Position = Vector2.new(pos.X, pos.Y - 35)
                    obj.name.Text = obj.player.Name
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)

print("[DarkMatter] Universal ESP loaded")

title: Speed Boost
description: Configurable walk speed multiplier with smooth acceleration curves. Includes anti-detection measures and auto-reset on teleport.
code:
-- Nova Hub | Speed Boost v1.8
-- Pet Simulator X Speed Hack

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local Config = {
    SpeedMultiplier = 2.5,
    SmoothAcceleration = true,
    AccelRate = 0.1,
}

local defaultSpeed = 16
local targetSpeed = defaultSpeed * Config.SpeedMultiplier

local function applySpeed()
    local humanoid = player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
    if humanoid then
        if Config.SmoothAcceleration then
            for i = defaultSpeed, targetSpeed, Config.AccelRate do
                humanoid.WalkSpeed = i
                task.wait()
            end
        end
        humanoid.WalkSpeed = targetSpeed
    end
end

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(char)
    char:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    task.wait(1)
    applySpeed()
end)

applySpeed()
print("[Nova] Speed Boost active: " .. Config.SpeedMultiplier .. "x")

title: Infinite Jump
description: Bypass jump limits with smooth physics simulation. Configurable jump height, multi-jump count, and auto-reset.
code:
-- Zenith | Infinite Jump v1.2
-- Brookhaven Jump Bypass

local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local Config = {
    JumpPower = 60,
    MaxJumps = math.huge,
}

local jumpCount = 0

UIS.JumpRequest:Connect(function()
    local humanoid = player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
    if humanoid then
        if jumpCount < Config.MaxJumps then
            humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)
            jumpCount = jumpCount + 1
        end
    end
end)

local function onStateChanged(_, new)
    if new == Enum.HumanoidStateType.Landed then
        jumpCount = 0
    end
end

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(char)
    local humanoid = char:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    humanoid.JumpPower = Config.JumpPower
    humanoid.StateChanged:Connect(onStateChanged)
end)

print("[Zenith] Infinite Jump enabled")

title: Precision Aimbot
description: Advanced aim assist with adjustable FOV control, smoothing curves, and target prioritization. Supports head, torso, and nearest-bone targeting.
code:
-- Phantom X | Precision Aimbot v3.1
-- Arsenal Aim Assist

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local Camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
local mouse = Players.LocalPlayer:GetMouse()

local Config = {
    Enabled = true,
    FOV = 120,
    Smoothing = 0.5,
    TargetPart = "Head",
    TeamCheck = true,
    VisibilityCheck = true,
    ShowFOV = true,
}

local fovCircle = Drawing.new("Circle")
fovCircle.Radius = Config.FOV
fovCircle.Filled = false
fovCircle.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
fovCircle.Thickness = 1
fovCircle.Transparency = 0.5
fovCircle.Visible = Config.ShowFOV

local function getClosestPlayer()
    local closest, minDist = nil, Config.FOV
    for _, p in Players:GetPlayers() do
        if p ~= Players.LocalPlayer and p.Character then
            local part = p.Character:FindFirstChild(Config.TargetPart)
            if part then
                local screenPos = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(part.Position)
                local dist = (Vector2.new(screenPos.X, screenPos.Y) - Vector2.new(mouse.X, mouse.Y)).Magnitude
                if dist < minDist then
                    closest, minDist = p, dist
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return closest
end

print("[PhantomX] Aimbot loaded | FOV: " .. Config.FOV)

title: Teleport Utility
description: Instant location teleportation with saved waypoints, coordinate input, and player-follow mode.
code:
-- Phantom X | Teleport Utility v2.0
-- Adopt Me Teleportation

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local Waypoints = {
    ["Nursery"] = CFrame.new(100, 5, 200),
    ["Park"] = CFrame.new(-50, 5, 150),
    ["School"] = CFrame.new(200, 5, -100),
    ["Hospital"] = CFrame.new(-150, 5, 50),
}

local function teleportTo(cframe)
    local hrp = player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if hrp then
        hrp.CFrame = cframe
    end
end

local function teleportToPlayer(name)
    local target = Players:FindFirstChild(name)
    if target and target.Character then
        local hrp = target.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if hrp then
            teleportTo(hrp.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 0, 5))
        end
    end
end

print("[PhantomX] Teleport Utility loaded")
print("Available waypoints: " .. #Waypoints)

title: Auto-Collect
description: Automatically collects items, coins, and rewards with intelligent pathfinding and priority-based collection order.
code:
-- Dark Matter | Auto-Collect v4.0
-- Murder Mystery 2 Item Collector

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local Config = {
    CollectRadius = 200,
    Priority = "coins", -- coins | weapons | all
    Speed = 100,
}

local function getCollectibles()
    local items = {}
    for _, item in workspace:GetDescendants() do
        if item:IsA("TouchTransmitter") then
            local parent = item.Parent
            if parent:IsA("BasePart") then
                table.insert(items, parent)
            end
        end
    end
    return items
end

local function collectItem(item)
    local hrp = player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if hrp and item then
        firetouchinterest(hrp, item, 0)
        task.wait()
        firetouchinterest(hrp, item, 1)
    end
end

RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
    for _, item in getCollectibles() do
        local dist = (item.Position - player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
        if dist <= Config.CollectRadius then
            collectItem(item)
        end
    end
end)

print("[DarkMatter] Auto-Collect active")

title: Fly Mode
description: Free flight with adjustable speed, noclip through terrain, and altitude lock. Currently patched and under maintenance.
code:
-- Velocity | Fly Mode v2.0
-- Jailbreak Flight Script

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local Config = {
    FlySpeed = 80,
    Noclip = true,
    ToggleKey = Enum.KeyCode.F,
}

local flying = false
local bodyVelocity, bodyGyro

local function startFly()
    local hrp = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart
    bodyVelocity = Instance.new("BodyVelocity", hrp)
    bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(math.huge, math.huge, math.huge)
    bodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.zero

    bodyGyro = Instance.new("BodyGyro", hrp)
    bodyGyro.MaxTorque = Vector3.new(math.huge, math.huge, math.huge)
    flying = true
end

local function stopFly()
    if bodyVelocity then bodyVelocity:Destroy() end
    if bodyGyro then bodyGyro:Destroy() end
    flying = false
end

UIS.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gpe)
    if gpe then return end
    if input.KeyCode == Config.ToggleKey then
        if flying then stopFly() else startFly() end
    end
end)

print("[Velocity] Fly Mode loaded | Press F to toggle")
